parsed.name: cubrid-mysql-insert-sequential
parsed.description: Single-row INSERT throughput — CUBRID (pycubrid) vs MySQL (PyMySQL). Replicates cubrid-benchmark Tier 1 bench_insert_10k_sequential.

queries:
CREATE TABLE bench_insert (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  name VARCHAR(100) NOT NULL,
  amount INT NOT NULL
)
